title: Petoskey Farmers Market
description: Weekly indoor farmers market featuring local produce, baked goods, maple syrup, and artisan crafts from Northern Michigan growers and makers.

title: Gaslight District Gallery Walk
description: Free self-guided art walk through downtown Petoskey galleries and shops. Enjoy wine, hors d'oeuvres, and meet local artists as you stroll the Gaslight District.

title: Petoskey Winter Festival
description: Annual celebration of winter in Northern Michigan with ice sculptures, a chili cook-off, horse-drawn carriage rides, and family activities along the waterfront at Pennsylvania Park.

title: Live Music at City Park Grill
description: Live acoustic performance by regional musicians at the historic City Park Grill. Enjoy dinner and drinks while listening to a mix of folk, blues, and Americana.
